landing.tagline: Learning made fun, one task at a time.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: That link doesn't go anywhere. Head back home to continue.

auth.name: Full name
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Password reset is coming soon. Check back later.
auth.verifyEmailHint: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Open it to activate your account—you can log in after that.
auth.kidStep1: 1. Check your email ({{email}}) and click the verification link.
auth.kidStep2: 2. Ask your parent to accept the invitation we sent to {{email}}.
auth.waitingForParentHint: We sent an invite to {{email}}. Ask your parent to click the link in the email to activate your account.
auth.waitingForParentHintGeneric: We sent an invitation to your parent. Ask them to check their email and accept the invite before you can log in.

a11y.goToSignup: Sign up — create a new account

inviteParent.title: Invite a parent
inviteParent.hint: Add a second guardian to your account
inviteParent.successHint: Ask your parent to check their email.

verify.invalidLink: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.linkAlreadyUsed: This link was already used. If you verified your email, continue with the next step below.
verify.parentSuccessHint: Your account is active. You can now log in.
verify.parentSuccessReturnInvite: Your email is verified. Return to the invitation link to accept and activate your child's account.
verify.kidSuccessHint: Your email is verified. Now ask your parent to accept the invitation so you can log in.
verify.allSetHint: Your email is verified and your parent already accepted the invitation. You can log in now.
verify.kidVerifiedParentSession: The child's email is verified. You are still logged in as a parent on this device — log out so they can sign in here, or they can log in on another device.

invite.notFound: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
invite.notPending: This invitation is no longer pending. It may already have been accepted.
invite.alreadyAccepted: This invitation was already accepted. You can log in or go to your dashboard.
invite.title: You've been invited!
invite.subtitle: {{name}} signed up on KiddoPath and listed you as their guardian.
invite.verifyThenReturn: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to confirm your email, then open the invitation link from your email again to accept.
invite.parentOnly: Please log out of the child account and open this link as a parent.
invite.successHint: {{name}} can now log in to KiddoPath.
invite.wrongAccount: You're logged in as {{email}}, but this invitation was sent to {{inviteEmail}}. Please log out and try again with the correct account.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.passwordTooSimilar: Password cannot be the same as your username or email.
errors.passwordTooCommon: This password is too common. Choose a stronger one.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.apiUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

api.invalidCredentials: No account found with these credentials.
api.invalidKidCredentials: No kid account found with these credentials.
api.kidNotActiveYet: Your account is not active yet. Ask your parent to accept the invitation.
api.kidNotActive: This kid account is not active.
api.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
api.invitationNotFound: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
api.invitationEmailMismatch: Your email does not match the invitation.
api.invitationNotPending: This invitation is no longer pending.
api.invalidRefreshToken: Your session expired. Please log in again.
api.notKidRefreshToken: Invalid session. Please log in again.
api.maxGuardians: This child already has the maximum number of guardians.
api.tokenNotValid: Your session is invalid. Please log in again.
api.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not available right now.
api.invalidGoogleToken: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
api.invalidGoogleIssuer: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
api.googleEmailNotVerified: Please verify your Google email and try again.
api.googleAccountIsKid: This Google account is linked to a child account. Try signing in with your password instead.
api.emailIsKidAccount: This email is linked to a child account. Try signing in with your password instead.
api.googleAccountConflict: This email is linked to a different Google account.
api.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before logging in.
api.verificationExpired: This verification link has expired. Please sign up again.
api.alreadyVerified: Your email is already verified. You can log in.
